ValidationRule.description: Booking,Amount and Opportunity all must be entered onto the CCR of Type Change in Booking Policy / De-Risk Decision
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(OR(ISPICKVAL(CCR_Type__c ,'Incorrect Order/Mis-quote'), ISPICKVAL(CCR_Type__c ,'Change in Booking Policy / De-Risk Decision')), OR( NOT(Amount__c > 0), ISBLANK( Opportunity__c ), Booking__r.Opportunity__r.Id <> Opportunity__r.Id, Booking__r.RecordType.Name <> 'Booking', Account_Name__c <> Booking__r.Account_Name__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 1)Amount, Opportunity and it's related Original Booking are required 2)AccountName should be equal to Account on Booking for CCR type "Change in Booking Policy / De-Risk Decision"
